All Guides

Oahu Kayaking and Beach Adventures

We go on lots of Oahu adventures and want to share how you can enjoy them too, so we have started making this collection to highlight our favorite trips. Che...

We go on lots of Oahu adventures and want to share how you can enjoy them too, so we have started making this collection to highlight our favorite trips.

Check out our deep dive into some of the best adventures on Oahu

Kaneohe Sandbar Kayak Experience

Get more info about our self-guided kayak tour out to Oahu’s Kaneohe Bay Sandbar.

Kayak to the Kaneohe Bay Sandbar

Chinaman’s Hat Kayak Adventure

Get more info about our self-guided kayak tour to Mokili’i Island, commonly known as Chinaman’s Hat.

Kayak to Chinaman’s Hat

Mokulua Islands Kayak Adventure

Get more info about our self-guided kayak tour out to Kailua’s twin islands.

Kayak to Kailua’s Twin Islands

Kahana Bay/River Rainforest Adventure

Get more info about our self-guided kayak tour through the Kahana Valley rainforest.

Kayaking in Kahana

Popoia Island Kayak Adventure

Get more info about our self-guided kayak tour out to Popoia Island.

Kayak to Popoia Island

Shark’s Cove Self-Guided Snorkel Tour

Learn more about snorkeling at Shark’s Cove on the North Shore.

Snorkeling at Shark’s Cove

Lanikai E-Bike and Snorkel Self-Guided Adventure

Learn more about our unique e-bike and snorkel adventure to Lanikai Beach.

E-Bike and Snorkel

Bodyboard at Kalama Beach

Learn everything you need to know about bodyboarding at Kalama Beach.

Bodyboarding at Kalama Beach

West Side Snorkel Guided Tour

Get more info about snorkeling at Electric Beach on West Side.

West Side Snorkel Tour

Kailua E-Bike Kau Kau Guided Adventure

Experience all Kailua has to offer with this unique guided tour.

Guided E-Bike Tour

More Oahu Adventure Guides

Active Oahu, LLC Wins 2022 Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice Award for Tours and Activities

Laie, Hawaii – July 28, 2022 – Active Oahu, LLC today announced it has been recognized by Tripadvisor as a 2022 Travelers’ Choice award winner for Tours and Activities.  The award celebrates businesses that have received great traveler reviews from travelers around the globe on Tripadvisor over t...

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
